crash_pressure.note: Historical OOS evidence exists for the frozen composite, but the current package has not completed global experiment-budget correction, point-in-time universe/vintage controls, or untouched prospective validation. Use only as a banded research warning, never as a crash probability or trade signal.

panic_bottom.note: Historical direction is suggestive but monthly OOS significance is marginal (p=0.1004; 98 fear events). This is a descriptive tendency, not a contrarian BUY signal or calibrated probability.

factor_momentum.note: Rejected for production: result was split-dependent; the stricter audit found mom_126 OOS IC approximately -0.0008. Fragility to split/methodology is treated as failure, not validation.

dollar_hub.note: Historical OOS relationship only. Not yet cleared global multiple-testing, post-cutoff prospective, cost, and contamination gates; use as macro context, not a directional trading edge.

cape_rate.note: CAPE predicts long-run RATE path, NOT crash timing (wrong sign vs near-term drawdown).

bandarmetrics_markup.note: The reported IC 0.173 came from an OHLCV proxy on a historical US equity sample, not point-in-time IHSG broker-summary/foreign-flow data. Do not label this as a validated IHSG bandar edge. Re-test on licensed point-in-time IDX data before emission.

accumulation_composite.note: Research composite only. Missing earnings/ownership/options inputs remain missing, never zero. Requires frozen specification and point-in-time OOS/prospective validation after licensed feeds are connected.

rotation_momentum.note: cross-asset rotation-momentum = coin-flip OOS. Keep RRG as a map, emit no signal.

price_alpha_discovery.note: price/volume fails to surface multi-year winners early (rank-IC -0.12). Alpha tab = structural hypotheses, not validated picks.
